videos.title: Social Media Safety Basics
videos.description: Learn essential tips to keep your social media accounts secure and protect your personal information online.

videos.title: How to Set Up Your Email Account
videos.description: A step-by-step guide to creating and configuring your email account for safe and efficient communication.

videos.title: Recognizing Online Scams
videos.description: Understand common online scams and learn how to identify suspicious messages and links.

videos.title: Privacy Settings on Social Platforms
videos.description: Discover how to adjust privacy settings on popular social media platforms to control who sees your information.
